title: Rocket: Robot on Wheels Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Sucker Punch's debut gives Rocket a tractor beam for object manipulation puzzles across Whirligig World.
narrative.core_loop: Use tractor beam to manipulate objects, collect tokens, and defeat Whisp in physics puzzle stages.

mechanics.map_notes: Core ability gated exploration defines Rocket: Robot on Wheels stage design.
